records.ety: [OE. yol, ol, AS. gel; akin to gela December or January, Icel. jōl Yule, Ylir the name of a winter month, Sw. jul Christmas, Dan. juul, Goth. jiuleis November or December. Cf. Jolly.]

defs: Christmas or Christmastide; the feast of the Nativity of our Savior.
quotes: And at each pause they kiss; was never seen such rule In any place but here, at bonfire, or at Yule.
